subtitle: A concise timeline of pivotal moments shaping the modern China-Japan relationship.

timelineItems.title: First Sino-Japanese War
timelineItems.description: Conflict over Korea shifted regional dominance to Japan.

timelineItems.title: WWII Conflict
timelineItems.description: Full-scale invasion marked by intense hostility.

timelineItems.title: Normalization
timelineItems.description: Diplomatic relations were established via the Joint Communique.

timelineItems.title: Territorial Tensions
timelineItems.description: Island disputes strained diplomatic and trade ties.

timelineItems.title: Modern Dynamics
timelineItems.description: Economic interdependence now coexists with strategic rivalry.
